title: Press Communiqué
text:
Press Release:Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Law and Justice

Press Communiqué

Posted On:
02 MAR 2026 7:04PM by PIB Delhi

In exercise of the power conferred by the Constitution of India, the President of India, after consultation with Chief Justice of India, is pleased to appoint the following Additional Judges as Permanent Judges in the Kerala High Court:



Sl. No.

Name (S/Shri)

Details

1.

Shri Justice Mullappally Abdul Aziz Abdul Hakhim, Additional Judge

Appointed as Permanent Judges of Kerala High Court.

2.

Shri Justice Syam Kumar Vadakke Mudavakkat, Additional Judge

3.

Shri Justice Harisankar Vijayan Menon, Additional Judge

4.

Shri Justice Manu Sreedharan Nair, Additional Judge

5.

Shri Justice Easwaran Subramani, Additional Judge

6.

Shri Justice Manoj Pulamby Madhavan, Additional Judge

7.

Smt. Justice Marakkaparambil Bhargavan Snehalatha, Additional Judge



****

Samrat

(Release ID: 2234638)

Visitor Counter : 220

Read this release in:

Urdu

,

हिन्दी
